review_title: Amazing customer support and easy to use
description: I would rate my overall experience a 10/10, A+, all of the above!!

As a result, this software has helped my streamline my work and enable me to have a centralized location for my data.
cons: As of this moment, I have no complaints at all. The software is so intuitive everything is easy to learn how to use and if there is a need for assistance, the customer support has always been easy to reach.

review_title: Hands down the best CRM - and I've used many

cons: I don't have any cons to say about Shape. The system is awesome and the support and service is second to none. Anytime I have a question or request it's handled that same day - UNHEARD of with any other CRM software solution.

review_title: Shape Software CRM
description: Shape Software is our most valuable business tool. Forget about complex and expensive CRM tools, Shape is the first software system that actually make the salesman's job easy. In addition, Shape's development team is always rolling out new and improved features on a regular basis, which makes me feel confident that they take pride in keeping up with current technology.
author: Jenna A.
pros: Shape Software is intuitive, organized, customizable, and great for any sized company. It's been our most valuable tool in helping to streamline our processes. Your are able to test out all of the features of Shape for 14 days free with their trial to get a better feel for how it works. Shape is very reasonably priced and comes with all the CRM necessities to run most businesses.
cons: Sometimes when you add or change information, you have to refresh in order to show the changes. Another function that I'd like to see added in future releases is batch de-duplication.

review_title: Finally found a software that has it all!
author: Gabrielle S.
pros: I am a digital marketing consultant for small businesses and entrepreneurs. Using Shape Software has truly streamlined the entire process for me. Before, I had a complicated system of finding, tracking and managing client leads. Shape Software has all of the features for automated lead capture, sending follow-up messages, and project management within one user-friendly interface. The automation was one of the biggest selling points for me. Working and managing my consultancy alone, I love being able to offload mindless tasks and know they are being handled efficiently and that I can go and check in on them at any time. I was able to replace my crowded excel spreadsheet, email inbox labeling, and manual list with one system. I was able to clear up my workspace, cut down project time and costs, and focus more on providing exemplary service instead of managing my own business.
cons: I haven't used very many softwares before Shape Software, but it is definitely more intuitive than the other ones, which was my biggest grievance when I discovered it. I am working on growing my team and haven't been able to test the integrated features yet, but I'm hoping adding team members is as painless as everything else has been.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: We are using Setshape CRM for our company and is helps a lot mainly for recuriting services.

cons: Since we been using bulk email marketing, the additional charge/email sent and esignature seems to be extra unnecessary spending. For the pricing they charge as monthly fee these features can easily included without additional charge.

review_title: A Truly All-In-One AI CRM That Delivers
description: My experience with Shape has been excellent. The depth of features combined with how smoothly everything works together really sets it apart. Automations, communication, and lead management feel fully integrated rather than patched together. I haven’t encountered any real downsides so far, and the platform has already made a noticeable impact on productivity.
author: Alex E.
pros: Shape brings an incredible amount of features together in one system, and everything works in perfect harmony. The automations, AI tools, lead management, and communication features all feel seamlessly connected. It’s rare to find a platform this powerful that’s still easy to use.
cons: There hasn’t been any major downside for me. The system is stable, the features work exactly as described, and support has been responsive. The only ‘con’ I can even think of is that I didn’t adopt Shape earlier. Switching sooner would have saved me a lot of time and headaches

review_title: Shape CRM Failed Me and Continues to Charge After Cancellation
description: As a seasoned mortgage professional with nearly a decade in the industry, I know the importance of choosing the right systems and vendors to support both my clients and my business operations. Unfortunately, my experience with Shape Software has been nothing short of a disaster—not just in their failure to deliver on basic onboarding and support, but in how they have mishandled my cancellation request and continue to charge me months after I formally canceled, and they acknowledged it in writing. I initially signed up for Shape with high hopes, believing the platform would offer real value to my CRM needs. Instead, I spent nearly two months requesting help to get set up, upload contacts, or receive basic onboarding. My calls and emails—many of which were directed to named individuals on their team—went unanswered. When I finally had enough and formally requested cancellation and full deletion of my data, I was met with canned responses and vague promises. Then I was told I was under an "annual contract"—a contract that was never presented to me, let alone signed. When pressed, Shape refused to provide a copy of this so-called contract. Eventually, I received an email stating they would honor my cancellation. Despite this written confirmation, they continued to charge my card in April and again in May. To date, Shape has: •Failed to provide support in the first place. •Failed to cancel my subscription as confirmed in writing. •Failed to delete my data despite multiple formal demands. •Failed to refund multiple unauthorized charges still hitting my account. This is a textbook example of how not to run a company—and a warning to any business owner or professional considering Shape as a CRM provider. Their lack of accountability, internal follow-through, and disregard for professional standards should be a serious red flag for anyone in a client-facing industry. I am now prepared to share this experience on every possible platform to ensure no other professional gets put through what I’ve experienced. To the directors of operations or executive leadership at SHAPE: your internal systems have failed, your communication is negligent at best, and your billing practices are unacceptable. Please DO BETTER.
author: Kat A.
pros: It was recommended by a Coaching Platform, but what a big disappointment. They don't even deserve one star.
cons: •Failed to provide onboarding or basic support. •Communication is negligent and ineffective. •Failed to cancel my account as promised. •Failed to delete my data. •Failed to refund unauthorized charges. •Continued to charge my card after cancelation. Their conduct has been unprofessional, unethical, and unacceptable.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best Mortgage CRM we’ve ever used
description: As an owner of ClickStart Mortgage, Myself and my team cannot speak highly enough of our experience with Shape Software. From day one, Shape has been an indispensable partner in our growth and success. Their dedication to understanding our needs and tailoring their solutions to fit our unique requirements has been nothing short of remarkable. Shape's team consistently goes above and beyond to ensure that we have the support and resources we need. Whether it's a quick question or a complex issue, their responsiveness and commitment to excellence have made a significant difference in our operations. The seamless integration and effectiveness of Shape's CRM system have been pivotal to our success. Their software is intuitive, reliable, and incredibly efficient, allowing us to manage our client and realtor relationships with ease and precision. The robust features and user-friendly interface have streamlined our processes and enhanced our productivity across the board. We are truly grateful for our partnership with Shape Software. Their contributions have been instrumental in not only driving our business forward, but more importantly, helping us provide an amazing experience for our clients. We look forward to continuing this successful relationship for many years to come. Thank you Shape Software, for being such a vital part of the ClickStart Mortgage family!
author: Jack H.
pros: **Exceptional Customer Support **Seamless Integration **User-Friendly Interface **Robust Features **Customization and Flexibility - **Reliable Performance**
cons: That we didn’t find them sooner. But in all seriousness there has not been anything that has stood out to me in regards to what we I don’t like about Shape

review_title: Bad - would not hire again
description: Horrible. l first hired the whole package: Landing Pages, CRM, portal and communications package. They never provided me with the landing page, but they kept on charging me for it. Total scam. Nobody speaks to you, the AI bot is terrible, and I really hate it when people rob my money.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Zapier integrations, text and email message automation
cons: They rip you off. My monthly service is $149.50 however, they charged me $484.00 and later refund $299.00, shorting me $36.00 every month. Then some other bogus charges, adding to a total scam of $750.00. So I try to call billing, but there is no billing phone number, just an email address. I try to call customer service, but there is no customer service phone number. The only number is for a sales line. So you send an email, and another one, and another one, and nobody responds or calls back. And this is for wrongful billing!
